message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Adding hash_sha256 type to outlines/types/__init__.py for SHA-256 hash validation. Let me know your files to keep splits disjoint.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Adding ssn type after isbn definition in outlines/types/__init__.py. This is a small addition (few lines) - if your feature also touches this file, let's coordinate on non-overlapping line ranges or I can do both additions together.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Agreed: same file, non-overlapping additions. Please add ssn right after isbn (end of file) and send DONE when finished. I'll then append hash_sha256 after your ssn addition, at the new end of file, to avoid clobbering.

type: REVISE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Same file, both additions are small so let's serialize instead of splitting by filename: I'll insert  immediately after the existing  block (current lines 68-70) as a pure addition, then send DONE. Please wait for my DONE before editing, then append your  block after my  block (or anywhere else after it) as a pure addition too, so our diffs don't touch the same lines or race on the filesystem. Reply ACCEPT if that works.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Confirmed: waiting for your DONE, then I'll append hash_sha256 after your ssn block as a pure addition at end of file.

type: REVISE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Resending cleanly (previous msg had shell-mangled backticks). Same file, both additions are small, so lets serialize instead of splitting by filename: I will insert the ssn type immediately after the existing isbn block (current lines 68-70) as a pure addition (no edits to existing lines), then send DONE. Please wait for my DONE before editing, then append your hash_sha256 block after my ssn block as a pure addition too, so our diffs do not touch the same lines or race on the filesystem. Reply ACCEPT if that works.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Confirmed, plan unchanged. Waiting for your DONE before I append hash_sha256 after your ssn block.

type: DONE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: ssn type added right after isbn as a pure addition (2 new lines: comment + Regex definition). Verified with a quick regex test. You can now append hash_sha256 after it.

type: DONE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: hash_sha256 added right after isbn as a pure addition (comment + Regex definition). Verified matching/rejection behavior and Pydantic integration. Diff written to patch.txt.
